overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character wearing a distinctive blue geometric cape walking through a dimly lit, narrow industrial corridor with textured metal walls. The character walks toward a closed elevator, turns around, and proceeds toward an open elevator at the opposite end, passing modern benches and abstract wall art.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with bench seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward the closed elevator at the end

entered.detail: industrial metal walls with grid-like texture pattern lining both sides of the hallway
modern bench with red and white horizontal stripes along the right wall
tall leafy plant in a white pot next to the bench
large rectangular wall art with red and black abstract design on the left wall
metal elevator door with geometric panel design, currently closed
recessed rectangular fluorescent lights in the ceiling
rectangular ventilation grille mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with textured metal walls. A striped bench and potted plant sit along the right wall while abstract artwork hangs on the left. The character approaches a closed elevator door at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor section with wall art and seating

events.description: character reaches the closed elevator, turns around, and begins walking back down the corridor

agents.ego_description: turns around at the closed elevator and walks back, passing the bench and artwork again

entered.detail: red fire extinguisher mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: After reaching the closed elevator, the character turns around and walks back down the corridor. The abstract artwork is now on the right side from this perspective, and the camera passes the bench again while a fire extinguisher becomes visible in the distance on the left.

events.description: approaching an open elevator with illuminated interior becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continues walking toward the open elevator at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: wall sign displaying the number 3 above the elevator
elevator door that is open, revealing the lit interior cabin
the illuminated interior of the elevator cabin visible through the open door

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the bench and artwork toward the opposite end of the corridor. A fire extinguisher passes by on the left as the character approaches an open elevator with a floor number sign above it, revealing the illuminated interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial corridor as a character travels to a dead end and then retreats toward an open exit. It begins with the character walking down the narrow hall past a striped bench and abstract artwork toward a closed elevator door. Upon reaching the door, the character turns around, shifting the perspective so the artwork now lines the right wall as they head back the way they came. The scene then progresses past the bench again, bringing a fire extinguisher into view on the left as the corridor opens up. Finally, the camera follows the character toward the opposite end of the hall, arriving at an open elevator with an illuminated interior and a floor number sign above.
